name: Ledges Digital Floral Print Distressed Persian Rug Green - Threshold™ designed by Studio McGee
description: Give any room in your home a warm, welcoming vibe with this Ledges Digital Floral Print Distressed Persian Rug from Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee. Featuring a digital floral print and distressed detailing for a weathered, elegant look, this woven area rug is sure to give your decor a lovely update. Crafted from soft fabric with canvas backing for cozy underfoot comfort, this rug features a low pile height, making it a perfect pick for high-traffic areas in your home. Best of all, the neutral-color patterning makes the rug pair easily with just about any existing decor.
